title: Uruguayan Smoked Sausage Fondue
description: A twist on traditional fondue, featuring smoky Uruguayan sausage and served with dense bread for dipping.
instructions: Bake the baguette slices in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for 5 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
In a large pot or fondue set, combine the shredded cheese and butter. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth.
Add the sliced Uruguayan smoked sausage to the cheese mixture and stir until heated through.
Transfer the fondue to a serving dish or ceramic bowl and place it near the table.
Serve immediately, allowing guests to dip their toasted bread into the cheese and sausage mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
Serve with additional bread on the side, if needed.
Enjoy with a glass of wine or other beverage of choice.
